title: Village Map on Start
description: This simple datapack/mod gives players a map to the nearest village when they first log into the world.
body:
![ map to the nearest village given to player when they first log into the game.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e8ee41dc33854fde569aaaf89d66ad7ef9874cca.png)

**This simple datapack/mod gives players a map to the nearest village when they first log into the game.**

### Installation Instructions (datapack):


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- Download the datapack file.

- Open your Minecraft world save folder:
- C:\Users\<YourUsername>\AppData\Roaming\.minecraft\saves\<YourWorldName>\datapacks
- Copy the downloaded datapack file into the datapacks folder.
- Start your Minecraft world and use ```/reload``` to load the datapack.





 



</details>
